name: USP消音版 | 商业皮革
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with colors and patterns inspired by vintage luggage, and had some parts wrapped in brown leather. Some people don't just want extra leg room... they want peace and quiet
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 受老式行李的启发，这把武器使用颜色和图案进行了自定义涂装，部分零件用棕色皮革包裹。 有些人不只是想要额外的活动空间… 他们想要和平与宁静
